scripts.smoke:detector: npm run prep && node scripts/smoke-detector-connectivity.mjs && node scripts/smoke-detector-synthetic-frame.mjs && node scripts/smoke-mask-adapter.mjs && node scripts/smoke-satellite-merge-behavior.mjs && node scripts/smoke-run-candidate-detection.mjs && node scripts/smoke-ui-auto-detect-wiring.mjs && node scripts/smoke-fallback-duplicate-source.mjs && node scripts/smoke-satellite-merge-gate-source.mjs
scripts.smoke:prep: npm run prep && node scripts/smoke-run-candidate-detection.mjs && node scripts/smoke-ui-auto-detect-wiring.mjs && node scripts/smoke-fallback-duplicate-source.mjs && node scripts/smoke-satellite-merge-gate-source.mjs
